channel.title: internet on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in internet on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to share internet with bluetooth in android |
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-yBexscYms8g/X3gbrmLKmZI/AAAAAAAABsM/nrN_YwXtbA0Rp0fSZJnTpOO_C9czqAbJgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1601706922841321-0.png" alt=""> You may be using hotspot to share internet to another device but there is another way to share internet via bluetooth. Sometimes, there could be issue with hotspot then this bluetooth method help you. - **Setup Bluetooth ** 1. Go to settings 2. Scroll or search and find hotspot & tethering. 3. Now you will find Bluetooth tethering. 4. Now tap and on the service. Now, you can pair the device that you want to share internet and once your pairing has done.

item.title: 10 ways to improve browsing speed in smartphone
